# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented automatic milestone materialization when a milestone-mode requirements run completes its MilestoneBundle stage. The completion path now calls materialize_bundle_with_source(), sets the auto-created or updated milestone active, records structured AutoMilestoneMaterializationFailed journal events without rolling back completed requirements state, and leaves project-seed completion unchanged. Materialization is now source-idempotent by looking up existing milestones with the same requirements_run_id and milestone_bundle_id backlink and retargeting regenerated bundle content into the existing milestone rather than creating duplicates.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the requirements completion path, manual project create --from-requirements bridge, milestone materialization service, active milestone selection, and existing daemon/test behavior.","order":0,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Added a requirements journal event type
